description: Negative fixture cases for the stable proof index gate. Each case is a complete index that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_stable_proof_index.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id. These cases keep the requirement-narrowing and packet-freshness-SLO rejections honest even if the canonical index changes shape.

cases.summary: A proof row whose state forces narrowing still backs a Stable lifecycle label instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A proven proof row rides a proof packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached, so the packet-freshness automation must narrow it before publication.
